get.description:
Returns the calls needed to draw credit. If the user has sufficient
registered collateral, the drawCredit call is returned.
get.summary: Build transaction calls to draw credit

parameters.description: Address to receive the borrowed funds
parameters.name: receiver

200.description: List of contract calls to execute drawing credit

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input or insufficient collateral

get.description: Returns credit details including collateral value, debt, health factor, interest, principal, and due date for a user account across all credit tokens
get.summary: Get user credit information

get.description: Creates list of contract calls to lock assets as collateral for credit account. Supports both underlying assets (e.g., USDC) which are wrapped into earn vault first, and earn positions (e.g., gtUSDCp) which are deposited directly.
get.summary: Calldata to lock asset as collateral

parameters.description: Account that holds the asset and will execute calls
parameters.name: account

parameters.description: Amount in lowest denomination (e.g., wei for ETH)
parameters.name: amount

parameters.description: Asset address in eth format - either underlying asset (USDC) or earn position (gtUSDCp)
parameters.name: asset

parameters.description: Earn strategy to wrap asset before depositing. If omitted, asset is deposited directly without wrapping.
parameters.name: earn

200.description: List of contract calls to execute locking of collateral

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input or missing parameters

get.description: Returns the current operator address and list of whitelisted credit receivers.
get.summary: Get operator status for an account

get.description:
Returns the removeCreditReceiver call if the receiver is currently
whitelisted; returns empty calls if already disabled.
get.summary: Build transaction calls to disable auto top-up

get.description:
Returns the calls needed to enable auto top-up. Checks on-chain state
and only includes setOperator (if not already set) and addCreditReceiver
(if not already whitelisted).
get.summary: Build transaction calls to enable auto top-up

get.description: Creates list of contract calls to approve USDC and repay debt to CreditHub
get.summary: Call data to repay credit debt

parameters.description: Account (borrower) that will repay the debt
parameters.name: account

parameters.description: Amount in lowest denomination (e.g., wei for ETH)
parameters.name: amount

200.description: List of contract calls to execute repayment

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input or missing parameters

get.description:
Creates list of contract calls to unlock and withdraw
collateral and potentially unwrap position from earn vault
get.summary: Call data to unlock collateral

parameters.description: Account that holds the asset and will execute calls
parameters.name: account

parameters.description: Amount in lowest denomination (e.g., wei for ETH)
parameters.name: amount

parameters.description: Whether to generate call to unwrap from earn strategy
parameters.name: unwrap

200.description: List of contract calls to execute unlocking of collateral

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input or missing parameters

get.description: Returns detailed information about a collateral asset including APY estimate (if earn vault), price in USD, underlying asset, and earn service name
get.summary: Get collateral asset details

get.description:
Creates list of contract calls to Claim a position from an earn vault,
converting vault shares back to the underlying asset.
get.summary: Claim position from earn vault

parameters.description: Owner address that holds the vault shares
parameters.name: owner

parameters.description: Address that will receive the Claimed underlying tokens
parameters.name: receiver

get.description:
Creates list of contract calls to unwrap a position from an earn vault,
converting vault shares back to the underlying asset.
get.summary: Unwrap position from earn vault

parameters.description: Owner address that holds the vault shares
parameters.name: owner

parameters.description: Address that will receive the unwrapped underlying tokens
parameters.name: receiver

get.description:
Creates a list of contract calls (approve + deposit) to wrap an
underlying token into an earn vault and receive vault shares.
get.summary: Wrap asset into earn vault

parameters.description: Amount of underlying asset to wrap
parameters.name: amount

get.description: Returns the credit protocol configuration including credit hubs and assets
get.summary: Get credit protocol configuration

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

get.description: health check
get.summary: health check

get.description: Returns a map of token symbols to token metadata supported by Stash on the specified chain.
get.summary: Returns supported tokens for a chain

parameters.description: Chain ID in CAIP format (e.g., eip155:8453)
parameters.name: chainId

200.description: Map of token symbols to token metadata".

get.description:
Opens a Server-Sent Events stream that pushes liquidity updates
whenever a reservation is created, replaced, or deleted.
All query parameters are optional filters.
get.summary: Stream available liquidity updates via SSE

get.description: Returns the pool address and available balance for the requested chain and token
get.summary: Get available liquidity for a specific pool type on a chain

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input or missing parameters

get.description: Returns configured fee and min/max limits from solver config
get.summary: Get fee and limits for a given protocol route

post.description: This endpoint returns signed authorization for an unlock transaction
post.summary: Get signing authorization for a an unlock transaction

parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g., Across, Lighter
parameters.name: protocol

parameters.description: ID of the order that is to be unlocked
parameters.name: orderId

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input or missing parameters

post.description: This endpoint streams signed authorization for a liquidity transaction
post.summary: Get signing authorization for a liquidity transaction

parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g., Across, Lighter
parameters.name: protocol

parameters.description: Destination chain Caip id, eg. eip155:8453
parameters.name: dstChain

200.description: This response is sent as a stringified json in SSE event with the event name 'data'

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input or missing parameters

get.description: Calculates the borrow quote including borrow cost, required input/output, and duration
get.summary: Get the borrow quote for a liquidity transaction based on the input data

parameters.description: Amount of tokens for which we are requesting borrow quote (in the smallest denomination)
parameters.name: amount

parameters.description: Preferred liquidity pool address to borrow from (hex)
parameters.name: pool

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input or missing parameters

get.description: Returns solver address and time solver will need to fill it.
get.summary: Returns solver address

parameters.description: destination token, either symbol or address
parameters.name: destinationToken

parameters.description: source token, either symbol or address
parameters.name: sourceToken

parameters.description: Protocol on which intent will be executed
parameters.name: protocol

BearerAuth.description: Enter your Privy JWT token with the `Bearer ` prefix
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

collateral.description: Asset collateral info per asset ID

creditHubs.description: Credit hub info per token symbol

strategies.description: Earn vault strategies keyed by strategy name

wrappedNativeAddress.description: Wrapped native token address (e.g., WETH). Zero value means native wrapping is not supported.

riskScore.description: RiskScore indicates the strategy's risk level (0–10 scale)

calls.description: List of contract calls to execute the Claim

data.description: map of credit token symbol (e.g., "USDC") to user credit info

amountOut.description: Estimated amount of tokens to receive

calls.description: List of contract calls to execute the unwrap

minAmountOut.description: Minimum amount of tokens to receive (after slippage)

tokenOut.description: Token address that will be received after unwrapping

debt.description: Debt is the total amount of drawn credit plus accrued interest

dueDate.description:
DueDate is the repayment due date (derived from grace period end).
Null when no active credit exists.

liquidationLimit.description: LiquidationLimit is the collateral value threshold below which liquidation is triggered

mHealthFactor.description: MHealthFactor is the maintenance health factor

principal.description: Principal borrowed amount in USD (Debt − Interest)

remainingCreditCapacity.description:
RemainingCreditCapacity is the maximum credit available to the user taking into account debt and fixed fees.
Note that this value is going to be the minimum of `remainingCreditCapacity(user)` and `immediateCreditCapacity` (see contracts).

totalCollateralValue.description: TotalCollateralValue is amount of deposited collateral value in token units displayed in highest denomination.

totalCreditCapacity.description: TotalCreditCapacity is the maximum credit available based on collateral in token units displayed in highest denomination.

borrowAmount.description: amount to be borrowed in lowest denomination of the borrowed token

borrowCost.description: cost to borrow the liquidity in lowest denomination of the borrowed token (excluding gas costs)

borrowToken.description: address of the token being borrowed from the liquidity pool

deadline.description: deadline for executing the borrow transaction

liquidityPool.description: address of the liquidity pool from which the liquidity will be borrowed

nonce.description: unique nonce for the borrow request

signature.description: hex string containing the MPC set signature used on the Liquidity pool contract

caller.description: eoa wallet address which will be used to call the liquidity pool contract

input.description: hex encoded input data which will be executed on the liquidity pool contract with borrowed liquidity

metadata.description:
protocol-specific metadata as JSON object. For lifi-escrow: {"srcChain": "eip155:1"}
where srcChain is the source chain CAIP ID used for on-chain order fetching fallback

quoteId.description: quote ID obtained from the borrow quote endpoint

txHash.description: tx hash of the deposit transaction which will be used to verify liquidity repayment guarantee

borrowCost.description: Cost to borrow the liquidity (in the smallest denomination). Excludes gas costs.

estimatedFillDuration.description:
Estimated duration for the borrow transaction to complete.
Depends on the required amount of confirmations on the source chain.

feeBps.description: Borrow fee in basis points. Excludes gas costs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the quote. Guarantees liquidity reservation. Used on borrow signature request.

liquidityPool.description: Liquidity pool from which the liquidity will be borrowed

quoteDuration.description: Duration for which this quote remains valid.

repaymentChain.description: Chain on which the repayment will be received

repaymentRecipient.description: Address to which the repayment should be sent

requiredInput.description: Amount of input tokens required to fulfill the borrow (in the smallest denomination)

requiredOutput.description: Amount of output tokens that will be received from the borrow (in the smallest denomination)
